common.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone: 11 digits starting with 01, or an international number starting with +
common.uploadFailed: Couldn't upload the file, please try again

auth.codeSent: A verification code was sent to your phone

profile.title: My profile
profile.name: Name
profile.phoneNote: Your phone is your login and can't be changed here.

admin.noAccess: You don't have permission to access this section
admin.smsHint: Credentials for the SMS provider (sms.com.eg / SMS Misr) — used to send customer verification codes.
admin.smsSenderHint: For SMS Misr, paste the Sender Token (smsmisr.com -> Sender IDs page, Sender Token column) - NOT the sender name. The Test environment only accepts the built-in Test Sender token.
admin.appearanceHint: Choose the admin language and theme — your preference is saved automatically.
admin.name: Name

attachment.drop: Drag an image here, paste, or click to upload
attachment.rateLimited: Too many uploads — wait a moment and retry
attachment.heicUnsupported: Photo format not supported — pick from your gallery

calculator.title: Calculators
calculator.subtitle: Indicative calculators for land area and reconciliation cost with the New Obour City Authority.
calculator.areaHint: Enter the original area to get the net area (after deducting roads & utilities).
calculator.actualAreaHint: Pick a standard area or enter a non-standard one.
calculator.actualAutoHint: Auto-calculated from the original area — you can edit it or pick a standard area.
calculator.standardHint: The standard plot the Authority allocates — defaults to the nearest standard; you can change it.
calculator.reconcileHint: Payments are based on the original and actual areas versus the nearest standard area.
calculator.enterValues: Enter the areas to see the result.
calculator.overMax: Areas larger than {max} m² need special review — please contact us.

guide.title: Licensing & Build Guide
guide.subtitle: Steps, companies and costs for licensing, building and handover.

priceIndex.title: Price Index
priceIndex.subtitle: Average land price per m² across New Obour districts.
priceIndex.noData: Not enough priced land data yet.
priceIndex.trendNote: The trend builds up month by month from the day tracking started — a dash means no history yet.
priceIndex.disclaimer: Indicative averages computed from currently published land plots and listings; not an official valuation.

mp.title: Marketplace
mp.confirmDeleteListing: Permanently delete this listing? This cannot be undone.
mp.manage: Manage the property catalog: types, sections, and attributes
mp.markHint: Per group: generate its own small card, and/or include it on the big poster. With no poster picks, the first 3 groups are used.
mp.genFromNbMasterplan: Mark the plot on the neighborhood masterplan
mp.locationMapReady: Location map ready — it will be saved with the listing
mp.locationMapHasSaved: A saved location map exists — open the annotator to adjust it.
mp.nbNoMasterplan: The selected neighborhood has no masterplan uploaded yet — add it under Districts & Neighborhoods first.
mp.partnershipQ: Open to partnership or plot consolidation?
mp.partnershipHint: Small plots can be merged with neighbours, built jointly, or a share can be sold — your offer will be marked and filterable.
mp.partnershipNotePh: e.g. 50% share, or merge with the adjacent plot
mp.partnershipContactHint: Interested? Contact the owner using the buttons below.
mp.partnershipCardDesc: Own a small plot (like 209 m²)? Offer it for consolidation with neighbours, a joint build, or sell a share — reach serious partners.
mp.noAttrsForCategory: No details are linked to this category yet.
mp.noAttrsForCategoryStaff: Tick the applicable details per category in:
mp.notLinkedHidden: hidden — not linked to any category
mp.posterIconsHint: The icon shown on each group's generated listing card. "Auto" cycles the default icons.
mp.categoriesHint: Top level of the catalog. Open a category to manage its groups; assign each type to a group from the Types screen.
mp.groupsHint: Groups sit between a category and its types. Assign each type to a group on the Types screen.
mp.classifiersHint: Type, Purpose and Condition. Edit each list's options; every listing picks one of each.
mp.appliesHint: Tick the values this property applies to. Leave a classifier blank to apply to all of its values.
mp.pickClassifiers: Choose Type, Purpose and Condition to see the relevant properties.
mp.compareEmpty: Pick at least two listings to compare.
mp.wishlistEmpty: Nothing saved yet — tap ♡ on any listing to save it.
mp.ownerCodesHint: Pick one or more codes (consecutive if possible). Our lands 00–09, companies & brokers 10–79. Personal owners have no code (ads auto-number 800–999).
mp.ownerCodesPersonal: Personal owners have no code — ads auto-number (800–999).
mp.confirmDeleteAttr: Delete this attribute permanently? It will be removed from every category and any saved listing values. This cannot be undone.
mp.duplicateBanner: You're creating a new copy of this attribute. Change the key (must be unique) and edit any fields, then save. The original attribute is left unchanged.
mp.keyTaken: This key is already used — choose another
mp.needNewKey: Choose a new key, different from the original
mp.publishOnAlsawarey: Publish this listing on Al Sawarey
mp.alsawareyLimited: Will show on Al Sawarey and New Obour — Types/Purposes limited to what Al Sawarey allows.
mp.newObourOnly: Will show on New Obour only.
mp.parentMultiHint: you can pick more than one parent
mp.parentNoneHint: none selected = shows under all types
mp.standardAreasHint: List of areas (m²) used to round Allocated Area — comma-separated
mp.ownerSearch: Search by name, phone or code
mp.optionListPickHint: Pick a ready list, or create one from the lists page
mp.optionListsHint: Reusable lists shared across details — editing a list updates every detail that uses it
mp.categoryAttrsHint: Pick a category (Type / Purpose / Condition), then tick the details that apply to it.
mp.applicableDetails: Details that apply to this category
mp.applicableDetailsHint: Tick the details that apply to this category. Changes save automatically. Click a detail's name to open its edit page.
mp.negoLoginToOffer: Sign in to make an offer
mp.negoOwnListing: You can't negotiate on your own listing

rationing.title: Rationing Sheets
rationing.manage: Manage the rationing-ledger database and customer inquiries
rationing.conflictPrompt: How to handle duplicate rows (same name, plot and block)?
rationing.conflictFilePrompt: Rows repeated within this file — what to do? (default: keep both)
rationing.conflictServerPrompt: Rows already on the server — what to do? (default: skip)
rationing.reportCardTitle: Know a sheet we don't have?
rationing.reportCardBody: Saw a rationing sheet on the Facebook page that's missing from our search? Report it and we'll add it after review.
rationing.reportMissedIntro: Tell us what you know about the sheet — any detail helps; we'll verify and add it.
rationing.reportYourName: Your name (so we can thank you)
rationing.reportFbDate: Publishing date on the Facebook page
rationing.reportThanksBody: We received your report — we'll verify the sheet and add it soon.
rationing.reportUsingAccount: We'll use the name and phone from your account ({name}) — no need to enter them.
rationing.reportNeedInfo: Please enter any detail about the sheet or attach a photo
rationing.reportRateLimited: You've sent several reports — please wait a little and try again
rationing.confirmDeleteBatch: Delete this batch and all its rows?
rationing.noSheets: No sheets yet — import an Excel file to start.
rationing.err_no_rows: No valid rows (make sure applicant name and plot no are filled)
rationing.err_parse_failed: Couldn't read the file — make sure it's an Excel file
rationing.searchTitle: Find your name in the rationing sheets
rationing.searchSubtitle: Type your name, the original owner, or the plot number
rationing.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or the original plot details
rationing.advancedHint: Pick a specific field to search only within it instead of everything.
rationing.clickToView: click a name to view details
rationing.noMatchesHint: Try a different spelling, or register to be alerted the moment your name appears.
rationing.searchFullName: Please search using the full name
rationing.thatsMe: Follow all news about your land
rationing.foundCardBody: Register now and we'll send you every update about your land first — all free.
rationing.foundCardCta: Follow all news about your land
rationing.notFoundCardBody: Register and the moment your name appears in any new sheet, we'll alert you.
rationing.citiesHint: The city list used in search and registration — add and edit freely.
rationing.confirmDeleteCityWithRows: This city is linked to {n} rows — they'll be unlinked (rows are kept). Continue?
rationing.contentHint: Control the visitor-facing text and options without a redeploy.
rationing.cfgBrowseAll: Allow browsing all data without searching
rationing.cfgTextsHint: Leave blank to use the default text.
rationing.scansHint: Upload the page images — matched to rows automatically by file name.
rationing.scanDropHint: Drop the scan folder here, or choose files
rationing.scanDropSub: JPG/PNG · file name must match the sheet's Source File (e.g. 1 06 2026 02.jpg)
rationing.reviewHint: Rows flagged for name verification (from import remarks). Correct the name, then verify.
rationing.duplicatesHint: Groups of records that match on (name + plot no + block no) after normalization. Review each group and delete the extra copies, keeping one.
rationing.duplicatesCapped: (showing first 200 groups — clean them then refresh for more)
rationing.showRecords: Show records linked to this photo
rationing.reviewedDuplicatesHint: Groups staff reviewed and confirmed are NOT duplicates (different people who happen to share name + plot + block). Any group can be moved back to the duplicates list.
rationing.followFoundSub: Enter your details to get every update about your land — free of charge.
rationing.followWatchTitle: Alert me when my name appears
rationing.followWatchSub: We'll text you the moment your name shows up in a new rationing sheet.
rationing.followDoneFound: We'll keep you posted about your land.
rationing.followDoneWatch: You'll get an alert the moment your name appears in a new sheet.
rationing.freeServiceNote: All services are free. We never share your details.
rationing.dashboardSubtitle: An overview of the rationing ledger
rationing.plotsSearchPh: Search a plot, owner or city…
rationing.fbNotice: Rationing data here is taken from the sheets published on the official Facebook page of the New Obour City Authority.
rationing.howToSearchBody: Type your name in Arabic in the search box and press Search. If you don't find it, register and we'll alert you.
rationing.savePhotoHint: Press and hold the image, then choose “Save image”.
rationing.otpSent: We sent a confirmation code by SMS to
rationing.registerError: Something went wrong, please try again
rationing.dropOrPaste: or drag & drop or paste here

lands.title: Districts & Neighborhoods
lands.manage: Manage districts, neighborhoods, blocks, and the land database
lands.exploreManage: Browse districts, neighborhoods, their advantages and updates
lands.followCta: Register to follow this area's updates — free service
lands.genLocationFromParent: Generate location map from parent's masterplan
lands.editLocationFromParent: Edit location map on parent's masterplan
lands.needParentMasterplan: Upload the parent level's masterplan first to create a location map by marking on it.
lands.name: Name
lands.openInternal: Internal entry (visible to our team until published)
lands.adjacencyHint: Pick directly-adjacent areas — the link is saved both ways automatically.
lands.mapHint: Upload one clean map; the system bakes a stamped copy per site automatically.
lands.confirmNotify: This update will be sent to followers by SMS. Followers:
lands.amenityTypesHint: The list of amenity types (Roads, Services, …) — add and edit freely.
lands.amenityNoTypes: Add amenity types first from the "Amenity types" page.
lands.amenityTypeInUse: Can't delete a type that's still used by amenities.
lands.amenityLibraryHint: Create an amenity once, then attach it to any number of neighborhoods, districts and listings.
lands.amenityLibraryEmpty: No amenities yet — create some in the Amenity library first.
lands.amenityCategoriesHint: Amenity categories are managed as a Shared Option List.
lands.amenityAttachHint: Pick the amenities that apply here — saved automatically.
lands.confirmNotifyGeneric: Send this update to all followers by SMS?
lands.addNeighborhoodHint: Enter just the name now; you can fill the rest after it's created.
lands.autosaveHint: each change is saved as you add it
lands.otpSent: We sent a confirmation code by SMS to
lands.annotHint: Add a shape, then drag it or resize from the corners, and pick a color. Shapes are saved onto the map.
lands.annotSaveErr: Could not save, please try again
lands.annotDrawHint: Press and drag on the map to draw

account.getUpdatesHint: You get an alert on anything new in this area.
account.forSale: I want to list it for sale
account.forSaleHint: Our team reviews your request and contacts you.
